Title: Morassi, Antonio
Subject Area: Ancient Italian|Early Western World|Italian (culture or style)|Mediterranean (Early Western World)|Venetian (Republic, culture or style)|Viennese
Overview: studied in Vienna with Max Dvořák and Julius Alwin von Schlosser; in Rome with Vasari; superintendant of Milan and Genoa; left civil service to pursue work on Venetian art from 1949
